title: [Dungeon, Green Tunnel]
description: The walls are thickly coated in some disgustingly smelly substance that glows a strangely luminescent green.  The entire tunnel here is slowly, but perceptibly rotating clockwise, spinning just enough so that one has to slowly step to the side every once in a while in order to properly stand upright.  Barely loud enough to be heard, you can perceive the sound of rock sliding smoothly against rock.
